name: extension-id
description: The stable identifier for an extension (e.g. ext:lifecycle, ext:views-l2).

aiGuidance.purpose: The stable identifier for an extension (e.g. ext:lifecycle, ext:views-l2).
aiGuidance.extraction: Extension IDs use the format 'ext:name' — lowercase with hyphens. Must be unique across the ecosystem. Chosen at extension definition time and never changed.
